description_long: This is a compact, modern SUV with a boxy silhouette and rugged styling, reminiscent of off-road vehicles. The exterior features pronounced wheel arches, a rear-mounted spare tire, and large side mirrors, all contributing to its robust appearance. The front grille is wide and flanked by rectangular headlights, while the rear is characterized by a prominent spare wheel and simple tail lights. The vehicle sits on chunky, multi-spoke wheels designed for both urban and off-road environments. The body appears to be constructed primarily from metal panels with glass windows and rubberized trim. The overall design suggests a vehicle built for versatility, comfort, and durability in city and suburban settings.
description: A boxy, rugged SUV with a rear-mounted spare tire, wide grille, and chunky wheels, designed for both urban and off-road use.
description_view_0: Rear view showing the spare tire mounted on the back door and simple tail lights.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the two-door configuration, large windows, and pronounced wheel arches.
description_view_2: Front view displaying the wide grille, rectangular headlights, and robust bumper.
description_view_3: Right side view similar to the left, showing the two-door layout and rugged wheel design.
attribute_wheel_design: Five-spoke, thick, rugged alloy wheels with circular cutouts
